flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Technical College of the Lowcountry fell 49% between 2006 and 2009 (15.4% → 7.9%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Technical College of the Lowcountry rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.1k → $6.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Technical College of the Lowcountry fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Technical College of the Lowcountry rose 37% between 2021 and 2024 (42.3% → 58.2%).
